content.speakerText: Hmm, your address says '123 Maple St'—but your passport says '125'.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗯，你的地址写的是枫树街123号，但护照写的是125号。
expectedAnswers: Oh no! That's a typo—I live at 125. Can you fix it?
You're right, it's 125. Thanks for catching that!
Oops, my bad. 125 is correct. Could you please update the record?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确承认错误并请求更新信息
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气礼貌得体
关键词覆盖：使用了 typo / correct / update / catch 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Your major's listed as 'Biology'—did you mean 'Biochemistry'?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的专业写的是生物学，你是想写生物化学吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I switched to Biochem last week. Please update it!
Yes, I changed it—thanks for checking!
I'm sorry, I forgot to update it. Biochemistry is correct. Could you revise it?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明专业变更并请求修正
语言准确性：正确使用 switch / change / update 等动词
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合学术或行政沟通语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 switched / change / update / Biochem 等关键词

content.speakerText: I notice your phone number here is +1 (555) 123-4567, but your application form says +1 (555) 765-4321. Which one should we use?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到这里你的电话号码是 +1 (555) 123-4567，但申请表上写的是 +1 (555) 765-4321。我们应该用哪一个？
expectedAnswers: The correct one is +1 (555) 765-4321. I must have typed it wrong earlier. Please update it.
You're right—I updated my number last month. Please use 765-4321.
Oops, my mistake. 765-4321 is correct. Sorry for the confusion!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确指出正确信息并请求系统更新
语言准确性：数字表达正确，动词使用恰当（update / correct / typed）
表达自然度：语气自然，包含道歉或感谢，符合服务场景
关键词覆盖：使用了 correct / update / mistake / typed 等核心词汇
